content: Quarterly HR slide: Remote-work pilot remains at 3 days per week. Core hours stay 10 AM to 3 PM EST.
Photo of a whiteboard after a facilities meeting. The sketch says: 'Use home office stipend for desks, chairs, monitors. Cap remains $500.'
OCR from reimbursement table: standing desk approved up to stipend limit, chair approved, premium desk needs manager exception.
Diagram showing Product X laptop mapped to 3-year AppleCare and Product Y monitor mapped to 1-year warranty.
